case_title: WILLIAMS, APRIL M. et al VS EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED AS TO APRIL M. WILLIAMS.
APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED AS TO REGINALD LAWRENCE II.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, APRIL M. LAWRENCE II, REGINALD AS TO DEFENDANT EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, APRIL M. LAWRENCE II, REGINALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EQUITY GROWTH ASSET MANAGEMENT $1,043.12 PRINCIPAL, $26.71 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,069.83, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFT. IS LIABLE FOR RETURN OF PLT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT & ACCRUED INTEREST. HOWEVER, SINCE DEFENDANT PURCHASED THE PROPERTY AFTER PLAINTIFF VACATED THE PREMISES, THE COURT DOES NOT ASSESS STATUTARY PENALTIES AGAINST THIS DEFENDANT, OR HOLD THIS DEFENDANT LIABLE FOR DAMAGES ARISING FROM HABITIBILITY ISSUES DURING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
